backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICP backend defining user profile and contact form data structures, with CRUD operations gated by role-based access control (guest, user, admin) and stable storage for profiles and submissions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that renames the old `submissions` field to `persistentSubmissions` when upgrading the actor's stable state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the contact form submission bug fix (in useQueries.ts and ContactSection.tsx) to its test IDs, components, and affected files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file for build planning and documentation purposes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card metadata for Equity Insurance Partners.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with homepage and /admin routes and wraps the app in a React Query QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/ChildBenefitsSec: Informational section explaining the financial benefits of children's life insurance policies, featuring two benefit cards (tax-free wealth building and compounded growth) on a navy gradient background.
frontend/src/components/CompaniesSection: Displays a section showcasing 5 named insurance carrier logos plus a '+25 Other Carriers' card, along with a card explaining the benefits of using an independent broker.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact form with fields for personal info, insurance interest, and preferred contact time, submitting via a React Query mutation hook with client-side validation and success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying company info, contact details, and services list for Equity Insurance Partners, with a copyright notice, caffeine.ai attribution, and an admin link.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section featuring a background image with overlay, Jonathan Ayan's name/title/headshot, and two CTA buttons that scroll to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, clearing the React Query cache on logout and retrying login if the user is already authenticated.
Displays two service cards for Life Insurance and Annuities with icons, descriptions, and feature bullet points, set against a decorative background pattern.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend interactions including fetching/saving user profiles, checking admin status, and submitting contact forms with enum mapping and BigInt conversions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a custom design system with CSS variables for a navy/gold insurance-themed color palette supporting light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that requires Internet Identity authentication, displays contact form submissions in a table, and handles first-time profile setup via a dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom color tokens (using oklch CSS variables), border radius, box shadows, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a fix request for a broken contact form submission error in ContactSection.tsx and the useSubmitContactForm hook, with one existing feature tracked under REQ-1.
